name: Biscochos (Sugar Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add sugar and oil. Beat well.
3. Add flour and baking powder a little at a time until it forms a smooth dough.
4. Let the dough rest about 15 minutes (until not too sticky).
5. Roll portions of dough into pencil logs.
6. Cut with a knife to make circles.
7. Gash 4 or 5 times with a knife.
8. Roll into a cinnamon/sugar mixture, if desired, or paint with beaten egg and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 - 20 minutes on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
10. After cooling, return to the oven (which has been shut off) and let crisp a few minutes.
11. Store in a glass jar with a lid.
This recipe can also be used to roll out dough and cut out shapes.
